message:
feat(priority): add operational telemetry counters to PriorityClassifier [ft-3kxe.28]

AtomicU64 counters for panes_registered, panes_unregistered,
classifications, signals_observed, overrides_set, overrides_cleared.
15 tests (10 unit + 5 property).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
